description: Run a SELECT and either materialize the result as a table (CTAS / INSERT pushdown) or return a DataFrame inline. Template body is rendered with Jinja2 (supports {% if %} / {% for %} / filters), with Dagster context auto-injected ({{ partition_key }}, {{ partition_key_range_start }}, {{ partition_key_range_end }}, {{ asset_key }}, {{ run_id }}).

outputs.description: A new or replaced table written directly on the warehouse

connection_url_env_var.label: Connection URL Env Var
connection_url_env_var.description: Env var holding a SQLAlchemy connection URL. Examples: SNOWFLAKE_URL, BIGQUERY_URL, REDSHIFT_URL.

destination_table.label: Destination Table
destination_table.description: Fully-qualified destination table (DB.SCHEMA.TABLE / project.dataset.table / schema.table). Required when return_dataframe=false.

return_dataframe.label: Return DataFrame
return_dataframe.description: If true, execute the SQL as a SELECT and return its result as a DataFrame asset (no CTAS / INSERT). Useful for inline reads downstream of pandas transforms.

sql.label: SQL
sql.description: The SELECT body. Wrapped in CREATE TABLE AS (replace) or INSERT INTO (append).

template_vars.label: Template Vars
template_vars.description: Variables to interpolate into the SQL template. Rendered via Jinja2 (supports {% if %} / {% for %} / filters), with str.replace fallback when Jinja2 isn't installed. User vars override the auto-injected Dagster context vars on name conflict.

if_exists.label: If Exists
if_exists.description: 'replace' = DROP TABLE IF EXISTS + CREATE TABLE AS. 'append' = INSERT INTO. Ignored when return_dataframe=true.

upstream_asset_keys.label: Upstream Asset Keys
upstream_asset_keys.description: Upstream Dagster asset keys this transform depends on (for lineage).

kinds.label: Kinds
kinds.description: Asset kinds for the catalog. Auto-inferred from the connection URL env var name if unset.

description.label: Description
description.description: Asset description shown in the catalog.

asset_tags.label: Asset Tags
asset_tags.description: Key-value tags applied to the asset.

partition_dimensions.label: Partition Dimensions
partition_dimensions.description: Multi-axis partition spec: list of {name, type, start, values, dynamic_partition_name} dicts. Overrides flat fields when set.

name: SQL Transform
